steps.title: Spot the core action
steps.content: The passage shows authors helping to shape a distinctly Mexican literary tradition—a creative, formative process. The blank should express a parallel action of creation.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
Realized (meaning made real or actualized) expresses this creative action—the nation made real its autonomous identity through literature.

The other three choices don't fit: overcame suggests defeating obstacles, decried expresses criticism, and evaded suggests avoidance.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
